subject: Fall Tournament 2026 — Title Sponsorship Wire Confirmation
snippet: Hi Aaron — confirming our wire of $6,139.25 for the Cedar Ridge Fall Tournament title sponsorship...
body:
Hi Aaron,

This confirms that Beaverton Brewing Co. has wired $6,139.25 to the Cedar Ridge Martial Arts Academy account for the Fall Tournament 2026 title sponsorship.

Wire ref: WR-BBR-2026-1017
Date: Oct 2, 2026

We'll have the banner and tent signage ready by Oct 15. Let us know the final booth placement once you have the venue layout.

Cheers,
Mike Rayburn
Sponsorship Coordinator
Beaverton Brewing Co.

subject: Bracket layout question — Adult Kendo Dan seeding
snippet: Hey Aaron — for the Adult Kendo Dan bracket (22 fighters), should we seed by current rank or...
body:
Hey Aaron,

For the Adult Kendo Dan bracket (22 fighters), should we seed by current rank or prior-year placement? We have 4 returning 3-dan from last year and a visiting 4-dan from Willamette that could shake up the draw.

Also — Kenji flagged his knee again. I can cover Adult Kendo Dan judging if he needs to sit that one out.

Let me know before the Oct 14 lock.

— Tom

subject: Willamette Kendo — 10 fighters confirmed for Oct 17
snippet: Aaron-sensei — our group of 10 is locked in for the Fall Tournament...
body:
Aaron-sensei,

Our group of 10 is locked in for the Fall Tournament on Oct 17. We'll carpool from Salem — expecting arrival by 7:30 AM.

Roster attached separately via Airtable link. All waivers submitted through DocuSign except one (Takeshi Mori — he's overseas until Oct 12, will e-sign then).

Any special parking instructions for visiting clubs?

Ossu,
Haruki Endo
Willamette Kendo Butouden

subject: Division placement for my son (Ethan, age 11)
snippet: Hi Mr. Delgado — I registered my son Ethan Nguyen for the Fall Tournament...
body:
Hi Mr. Delgado,

I registered my son Ethan Nguyen (age 11, 4-kyu kendo, CR-00003) for the Fall Tournament. He's been placed in Kids Kendo U12 but I wanted to check — he turns 12 in November. Is he still eligible for U12 since the tournament is Oct 17?

Also, his asthma inhaler is in his gear bag. The medical form is on file.

Thank you,
Lisa Nguyen
